summary: Iteration 3 — Sorthea Studio v2 (Visual Order redesign). Backend pytest 5/5 pass on the v2 schema (header.logo/navLinks/actions/shell; sections; footer; announcementBar with backgrounds+announcements). Frontend Playwright: 51/51 scenarios from the review request pass — Builder opens with Encabezado, three-zone layout intact; LEFT TREE (announcementBar/header/menu/sections/footer) switches inspector title; SYNC canvas→inspector for store-logo/store-nav-*/store-action-*/store-announcement-bar/store-footer works; SYNC inspector→canvas paints sel-el outline on the correct canvas element; LOGO controls (mode/text/position/center/size/x/y/verified) reflect on canvas; NAV capacity (fit-meter green@4, amber@6, red@7, Límite alcanzado + nav-add disabled at NAV_MAX=7); ACTIONS (3/3 count, presets disabled at 3, add/remove works); SHELL accordion + BackgroundEngine gradient updates store-header backgroundImage to linear-gradient; RESPONSIVE mobile: hamburger visible, text nav hidden, action-count /2, action-mobile-badge-*, action-label-warning-* for long labels; ANNOUNCEMENT add/edit/remove/transition/marquee reflects on canvas; FOOTER brand edit reflects on canvas; SECTIONS toggle hides store-section-sorteos; UNDO/REDO work and buttons disable correctly; PUBLISH persists via PUT /api/config and toggles to 'Publicado' disabled state; RESET restores 4 nav + 3 actions + 3 sections; /store renders full storefront with rotating announcements and sorteo-add-s1 opens store-cart-drawer; empty inspector state shown on blank-canvas click.
critical_code_review_comments: ConfigContext deepMerge treats arrays as override (correct) so PUT responses that shrink arrays behave as expected; verified with nav/announcements/sections length changes.
server.py PUT /api/config still lacks strict Pydantic validation of nested config schema — acceptable for a config-as-blob CMS.
Storefront wrapClick clears selection when clicking blank storefront background; StoreHeader/StoreBody sub-elements call stopPropagation correctly so canvas-to-inspector sync stays accurate.
LeftTree isActive logic uses `element` startsWith('nav') — works for menu vs header distinction; small ambiguity if a future non-nav element name also starts with 'nav', low risk.
headerFit rules (NAV_MAX=7, ACTION_MAX_DESKTOP=3, ACTION_MAX_MOBILE=2, MOBILE_LABEL_MAX=8) are consistent between inspector and StoreHeader; nav-add correctly disabled at NAV_MAX.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests call POST /api/config/reset before/after to restore v2 defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2 schema is header.{logo{mode,text,image,size,offsetX,offsetY,position,verified,verifiedIcon,center}, navLinks[], actions[], shell{paddingY,sticky,shadow,pill,textColor,background{type,color,gradient,pattern}}}. Selection {section, element}. Key testids: tree-{announcementBar|header|menu|sections|footer}, inspector-title, store-{logo|nav-i|action-i|announcement-bar|footer|hamburger|header}, hdr-row-{logo|nav-i|action-i|shell}, fit-meter[data-status=green|amber|red], nav-capacity-warning, action-count, action-mobile-badge-i, action-label-warning-i, {shell|ann|ftr}-bg-type-{solid|gradient|pattern}. Empty state via clicking storefront outer wrapper (stopPropagation on inner canvas elements). Note: on mobile with default 3 actions, action-count reads '3/2' (already over limit) — a warning is shown; adding actions is still disabled when count>=3.
